description: Downloads the contents of a document: tc-download-document
name: ip

outputs.description: The name of the indicator. TC.Indicator.Type The type of the indicator.
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.Name

outputs.description: The ID of the indicator. TC.Indicator.Description The description of the indicator.
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.ID

outputs.description: The owner of the indicator. TC.Indicator.CreateDate date
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.Owner

outputs.description: TC.Indicator.LastModified date The date on which the indicator was modified.
outputs.name: The date on which the indicator was created.

outputs.description: The threat rating of the indicator. TC.Indicator.Confidence The confidence rating of the indicator.
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.Rating

outputs.description: The value assigned by DBot for the indicator. DBotScore.Type The type assigned by DBot for the indicator.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The score assigned by DBot for the indicator. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score

outputs.description: The IP address of the indicator. IP.Malicious.Vendor For malicious IP addresses, the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: For malicious IP addresses, the full description.
outputs.name: IP.Malicious.Description
